quotes.text: Silence sometimes protects the heart.
Pain teaches what comfort never can.
Hard times reveal true people.
Not every smile shows happiness.
Some wounds are invisible but deep.
Patience is powerful when life is hard.
Allah knows what your heart hides.
Broken hearts still beat with hope.
Every pain carries a hidden lesson.
Sometimes distance protects your peace.
Tears speak when words fail.
Healing takes time, trust the process.
Not everyone understands your silence.
Strong people hide the deepest pain.
Your struggle will become your strength.
Life tests those it wants to grow.
Some endings protect your future.
Faith makes the impossible possible.
Every night ends with a new morning.
You are stronger than your fears.
Small steps still move you forward.
Don't lose hope, better days are coming.
Your pain has a purpose.
Silence is sometimes the best answer.
Trust Allah even when you don't understand.
What hurts today will make you stronger tomorrow.
Peace begins when expectations end.
Be patient, everything comes at the right time.
Let go of what breaks you.
Your story is not over yet.
